lines.english: Last night, Wang Peng and Li You went to Gao Wenzhong's house to hang out. At Gao Wenzhong's house, they met Gao Wenzhong's older sister. Her name is Gao Xiaoyin, and she works at the school library. She offered Wang Peng tea. Wang Peng had two cups. Li You didn't drink tea, she only had a glass of water. They chatted and watched TV together. Wang Peng and Li You didn't go home until twelve o'clock.

example_sentence.py: Jīntiān Māma hē le sān bēi shuǐ.
example_sentence.en: Mom drank three glasses of water today.

example_sentence.py: Jīntiān Māma hē le sān bēi shuǐ.
example_sentence.en: Mom drank three glasses of water today.

example.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example_sentence.cn: 我请他六点吃晚饭,他六点半才来。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ qǐng tā liù diǎn chī wǎnfàn, tā liù diǎn bàn cái lái.
example_sentence.en: I invited him out to dinner at six o'clock. He didn't arrive until six-thirty.

example_sentence.cn: 小高常常晚上十二点才回家。
example_sentence.py: Xiǎo Gāo chángcháng wǎnshang shí'èr diǎn cái huí jiā.
example_sentence.en: Little Gao often doesn't come home until midnight.

example_sentence.cn: 小高常常晚上十二点才回家。

example_sentence.en: Little Gao often doesn't come home until midnight.

database_items.original_text: 昨天晚上,王朋和李友去高文中家玩儿。
database_items.original_pinyin: zuótiān wǎnshang, Wáng Péng hé Lǐ Yǒu qù Gāo Wénzhōng jiā wánr.
standard_answers: Last night, Wang Peng and Li You went to Gao Wenzhong's house to hang out.

database_items.original_text: 她叫高小音,在学校的图书馆工作。
database_items.original_pinyin: tā jiào Gāo Xiǎoyīn, zài xuéxiào de túshūguǎn gōngzuò.

database_items.original_text: At Gao Wenzhong's house, they met Gao Wenzhong's older sister.
standard_answers: 在高文中家,他们认识了高文中的姐姐。

database_items.original_text: She offered Wang Peng tea. Wang Peng had two cups.
standard_answers: 她请王朋喝茶,王朋喝了两杯。

database_items.original_text: We go home at ten o'clock.
My younger brother goes to play ball at four o'clock.

video_global_config.visual_style: Cinematic 3D animation, Pixar style, warm and inviting color palette, soft lighting, detailed textures, creating a cozy and friendly atmosphere.

character_definitions.name: 王朋 (Wáng Péng)
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A male Chinese university student in his early 20s, with short black hair, wearing stylish black-rimmed glasses, a cozy navy blue sweater, and jeans. He has a friendly and curious expression.

character_definitions.name: 李友 (Lǐ Yǒu)
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A female Chinese university student in her early 20s, with shoulder-length brown hair styled in a bob. She wears a bright yellow hoodie and has a cheerful, expressive face.

character_definitions.name: 高文中 (Gāo Wénzhōng)
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A male Chinese university student in his early 20s, the host. He has a welcoming smile, slightly messy hair, and is dressed comfortably in a grey t-shirt and sweatpants.

character_definitions.name: 高小音 (Gāo Xiǎoyīn)
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A gentle-looking woman in her mid-20s, Gao Wenzhong's older sister. She has long, straight black hair tied in a loose ponytail, and wears a cream-colored cardigan over a simple dress. She has a calm and kind demeanor.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 夜晚，王朋和李友来到高文中家门口，高文中热情地开门迎接他们。门内的灯光温暖地照出来。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style animation. Exterior night shot of a modern apartment door. Wang Peng and Li You are standing outside, smiling. The door opens, revealing Gao Wenzhong with a big, welcoming smile. Warm, golden light spills out from the apartment, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. Cinematic, medium shot.

voice_over.content: 昨天晚上, 王朋和李友去高文中家玩儿。
voice_over.pinyin: Zuótiān wǎnshang, Wáng Péng hé Lǐ Yǒu qù Gāo Wénzhōng jiā wánr.

screen_overlay.sub_text: qù...jiā wánr (to go to someone's house to hang out)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 在客厅里，高文中向王朋和李友介绍他的姐姐高小音。高小音微笑着和他们打招呼。背景是书架和温馨的家居装饰。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style animation. Interior of a cozy, modern living room. Gao Wenzhong gestures towards his older sister, Gao Xiaoyin, introducing her to Wang Peng and Li You. Gao Xiaoyin smiles kindly. The background features a well-stocked bookshelf and warm home decor. Soft indoor lighting. Medium shot focusing on the four characters' interaction.

voice_over.content: 在 高文中家, 他们认识了高文中的姐姐。她叫高小音, 在学校的图书馆工作。
voice_over.pinyin: Zài Gāo Wénzhōng jiā, tāmen rènshi le Gāo Wénzhōng de jiějie. Tā jiào Gāo Xiǎoyīn, zài xuéxiào de túshūguǎn gōngzuò.

screen_overlay.main_text: 认识 (rènshi) 姐姐 (jiějie) 图书馆 (túshūguǎn)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高小音正在给王朋倒茶，茶杯冒着热气。王朋面前已经有一杯茶了。李友则拿着一杯水在旁边微笑。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style animation. Close-up shot of Gao Xiaoyin pouring steaming hot tea from a ceramic teapot into a cup for Wang Peng, who already has one cup in front of him. The camera then pulls back to a medium shot showing Li You sitting beside them on the sofa, holding a glass of water and smiling. Warm, focused lighting on the tea set.

voice_over.content: 她请王朋喝茶, 王朋喝了两杯。李友不喝茶, 只喝了一杯水。
voice_over.pinyin: Tā qǐng Wáng Péng hē chá, Wáng Péng hē le liǎng bēi. Lǐ Yǒu bù hē chá, zhǐ hē le yì bēi shuǐ.

screen_overlay.main_text: 喝茶 (hē chá) 两杯 (liǎng bēi) 喝水 (hē shuǐ)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to drink tea; two cups; to drink water

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 四个人一起坐在沙发上，开心地边聊天边看电视。电视屏幕的光照亮了他们愉快的脸庞。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style animation. A wide shot of the four characters sitting comfortably on a large sofa, laughing and chatting together. They are watching a bright, colorful show on a large TV. The glow from the television screen illuminates their happy, expressive faces in the dimly lit room. Dynamic and joyful atmosphere.

voice_over.content: 他们一起聊天儿、看电视。

screen_overlay.main_text: 一起聊天儿 (yìqǐ liáotiānr) 看电视 (kàn diànshì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to chat together; to watch TV

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋和李友在门口与高文中兄妹告别。墙上的时钟清晰地指向午夜十二点。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style animation. Shot from inside the apartment looking towards the open doorway at night. Wang Peng and Li You are waving goodbye to Gao Wenzhong and Gao Xiaoyin. The camera pans up to a stylish wall clock, with the hands clearly pointing to 12:00. The characters look happy but a little tired. Farewell scene with a sense of time.

voice_over.content: 王朋和李友晚上十二点才回家。
voice_over.pinyin: Wáng Péng hé Lǐ Yǒu wǎnshang shí'èr diǎn cái huí jiā.

screen_overlay.sub_text: not until, only then; to go home
